type.name: 🎉 Features 🎉
type.change: Revamped the app UI from the ground up (M3 expressive)
Added .gitignore support when creating a new repository
Added ability to delete an SSH key from your account
Added ability to list all user repositories with remote search and filters
Added seamless remote search across explore repositories, issues, and users
Added a new way to create an organization team
Added a new way to create an organization or repository label with preview
Enhanced organization creation with a new look
Added custom timeout for API calls (change in Settings → Security)
Added a new custom color picker
Added ability to edit or delete a milestone
Added ability to edit a release
Added ability to delete an action (CI) variable
Added ability to create a pull request when adding a new file
Added ability to upload any kind of file when creating a file
Added ability to list all pull requests with search and filters
Added ability to manually define Gitea/Forgejo version if the API does not return a valid version
Added a new reaction style for issues, PRs, and comments
Added ability to hide tabs if they are disabled for a repository
Added ability to render all emojis from the server for reactions
Long press each emoji to see the list of users who reacted

type.name: v🚀 Improvements 🚀
type.change: Show add/delete topic buttons to admins only
Improved notifications badge count
Sync licenses with the API for a repository
Use absolute date and time where necessary
Improved activities UI with more information
Copy SSH key to clipboard
Improved login screen UI
Added more options to create system users for system admins
Added additional filter/sort features in explore repositories
Translation updates

type.name: 🐛 Bug Fixes 🐛
type.change: Fixed deep linking
Fixed comments regex
Fixed URI in update account screen
Fixed default branch name translation
Fixed home screen selection
